titulo: Sales Opportunity Generation from the Newsletter
descricao: Analyzes monthly newsletter clicks in the CRM, identifies engaged leads who aren't community members yet, and automatically creates sales opportunities.
problema: Leads who showed interest via the newsletter weren't converted into sales opportunities — the engagement was lost.
resultado: Engaged leads are automatically converted into CRM opportunities, with context notes.
metrica: Automatic monthly opportunity creation from engagement data
destaques: Cross-referencing newsletter data with Discord members
